Our goal for this meeting is to bring members who have experienced the steps in their lives together with folks getting acquainted with a new way of life. It is not based on your age, but where you are with regard to your program. No doubt that we will learn from each other. If you are a sponsor, bring a sponsee if you can. If you are new and need a sponsor bring yourself and a friend if you like. If you are sponsored, invite them to join us.

name: The Honesty Room (Zoom)
notes:
Meeting Guide Users: Click the VIEW WEB PAGE button below to view this meeting on aasj.org/meetings

We are a Plain Language Big Book (PLBB) meeting where we read half a chapter then open for discussion but we’re on our 1st journey with the PLBB, so we hope you’ll grow with us as we fumble finding our way in some alcoholic fashion. When available, we have a speaker to share their experience, strength, and hope or a story from ANY BB edition at the end of the month!

This is the Honesty Room, and if you are having a problem with any other form of booze you are welcome to talk honestly about it, and we request that you refer to it only as booze or as “another type of alcohol”, out of respect for our Third Tradition. We like to live up to our name so please be as honest as you’re comfortable with as we openly share all of our experiences!

#indoor

name: Keep It Simple
notes:
Meeting Guide Users: Click the VIEW WEB PAGE button below to view this meeting on aasj.org/meetings

We utilize the Steps and Traditions as well as stories from the Big Book alternately. All are welcome to be in service, not just home group members; please see any HG member for further details. This meeting supports freedom to share however or whatever is effecting you in a very casual manner typically without filter. This is a safe space to ask questions and learn more about our program of recovery no matter where you are in your recovery.

Weekly format: (1) Step One, (2) Story, (3) Tradition One, (4) Story, (5) Step Two, (6) Story, (7) Tradition Two, (8) Story, etc.
